name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off when you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed your subscription with Bright Smile Dental ended — no pressure at all, life gets busy. We just wanted you to know the door is always open, and whenever you're ready for a cleaning or check-up, here's 20% off to make coming back a little easier:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days. Just apply it at checkout the next time you book.

If something about your experience wasn't quite right, we'd genuinely love to hear it — hit reply and we read every note personally. No sales pitch, promise.

Take care of those smiles,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a gentle heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} is good for a few more days if you'd like to come back. No pressure either way!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
